title: Plan with Claude Opus, Build with Kimi K2.6? LIVE Mixed-Provider Benchmark
summary: Cole Medin benchmarks mixed-provider LLM workflows using Claude Opus and Kimi K2.6 in the Dark Factory project. He runs four different configurations across three real GitHub issues, evaluating each on seven dimensions to determine optimal role assignment between planning and implementation phases.
